awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome Coq libraries, plugins, tools, verification projects, and resources [maintainers=@anton-trunov,@palmskog]
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of awesome Coq libraries, plugins, tools, verification projects, and resources [maintainers=@anton-trunov,@palmskog]

nodes.itemHTML: • LibHypsstars15 - Library of Ltac tactics to manage and manipulate hypotheses in proofs.
• Lectures on Software Foundationsstars21 - Material on the Software Foundations series of textbooks, including a series of YouTube videos.
• VCFloatstars9 - Framework for verifying C programs with floating-point computations.
• Coq keyword on Zenodo
• Proofs and Reliable Programming using Coq - Introduction to developing and verifying programs with Coq.
• VsCoqstars202 - Extension for the Visual Studio Code and VSCodium editors.
• PyCoqstars40 - Set of bindings and libraries for interacting with Coq from inside Python 3.
• Lysxia's blog
• Coq tag on Proof Assistants Stack Exchange

• Tactician - Interactive tool which learns from previously written tactic scripts across all the installed Coq packages and suggests the next tactic to be executed or tries to automate proof synthesis fully.
• ConCertstars74 - Framework for smart contract testing and verification featuring a code extraction pipeline to several smart contract languages.
• Coq requirements in Common Criteria evaluations - Guide on how to write readable and reviewable Coq code in high assurance applications.
• Itauto - SMT-like tactics for combined propositional reasoning about function symbols, constructors, and arithmetic.
• Four Color Theoremstars121 - Formal proof of the Four Color Theorem, a landmark result of graph theory.
• Jasminstars112 - Formalized language and verified compiler for high-assurance and high-speed cryptography.
• Floating-Point Numbers and Formal Proofstars5 - Introductory course on Coq real numbers and floating-point numbers from the Flocq library.
• Interaction Treesstars159 - Library for representing recursive and impure programs.
• Sailstars388 - Tool for specifying instruction set architecture semantics of processors and generating Coq definitions.
• Monaestars62 - Monadic effects and equational reasoning.
• CertiGraphstars10 - Library for reasoning about directed graphs and their embedding in separation logic.
• Hydras & Co.stars36 - Continuously in-progress book on Kirby and Paris' hydra battles and other entertaining formalized mathematics in Coq, including library code and exercises.
• MathComp Extrastars3 - Extra material for the Mathematical Components library, including the AKS primality test and RSA encryption and decryption.
• Coq Package Index - Collection of Coq packages based on opam.
• Dune - Composable and opinionated build system for OCaml and Coq (former jbuilder).
• opam - Flexible and Git-friendly package manager for OCaml and Coq with multiple compiler support.
• CoqInterval - Tactics for performing proofs of inequalities on expressions of real numbers.
• Coq Platformstars115 - Curated collection of packages to support Coq use in industry, education, and research.
• Tarjan and Kosarajustars8 - Verified implementations of algorithms for topological sorting and finding strongly connected components in finite graphs.
• Algebra Tacticsstars24 - Ring and field tactics for Mathematical Components.
• Prosa - Definitions and proofs for real-time system schedulability analysis.
• CoLoRstars27 - Library on rewriting theory, lambda-calculus and termination, with sub-libraries on common data structures extending the Coq standard library.
• Flocq - Formalization of floating-point numbers and computations.
• Bedrock Bit Vectorsstars25 - Library for reasoning on fixed precision machine words.
• coq-dpdgraphstars79 - Tool for building dependency graphs between Coq objects.
• Coq Zulip chat archive
• coq-community package maintenance projectstars66
• 100 famous theorems proved using Coqstars36

• coq-toolsstars34 - Scripts for manipulating Coq developments.
    • find-bug.py - Automatically minimizes source files producing an error, creating small test cases for Coq bugs.
    • absolutize-imports.py - Processes source files to make loading of dependencies robust against shadowing of file names.
    • inline-imports.py - Creates stand-alone source files from developments by inlining the loading of all dependencies.
    • minimize-requires.py - Removes loading of unused dependencies.
    • move-requires.py - Moves all dependency loading statements to the top of source files.
    • move-vernaculars.py - Lifts many vernacular commands and inner lemmas out of proof script blocks.
    • proof-using-helper.py - Modifies source files to include proof annotations for faster parallel proving.
• Modeling and Proving in Computational Type Theorystars37 - Book covering topics in computational logic using Coq, including foundations, canonical case studies, and practical programming.
• Hybrid - System for reasoning using higher-order abstract syntax representations of object logics.
• FreeSpecstars50 - Framework for modularly verifying programs with effects and effect handlers.
• Mczifystars19 - Library enabling Micromega arithmetic solvers to work when using Mathematical Components number definitions.
• coqdoc - Standard documentation tool that generates LaTeX or HTML files from Coq code.
• Coq-Elpistars83 - Extension framework based on λProlog providing an extensive API to implement commands and tactics.
• SerAPIstars108 - Tools and OCaml library for (de)serialization of Coq code to and from JSON and S-expressions.
• Autosubst 2stars13 - Tool that generates Coq code for handling binders in syntax, such as for renaming and substitutions.
• Coq Nix Toolboxstars19 - Nix helper scripts to automate local builds and continuous integration for Coq.
• coq-scriptsstars6 - Scripts for dealing with Coq files, including tabulating proof times.
• Q*certstars50 - Platform for implementing and verifying query compilers.
• Bignumsstars20 - Library of arbitrarily large numbers.
• RISC-V Specification in Coqstars79 - Definition of the RISC-V processor instruction set architecture and extensions.
• Vélus - Verified compiler for a Lustre/Scade-like dataflow synchronous language.
• Goedelstars24 - Constructive proof of the Gödel-Rosser incompleteness theorem.
• coq-community Templatesstars10 - Templates for generating configuration files for Coq projects.
• Docker-Coq GitHub Action - GitHub container action that can be used with Docker-Coq or Docker-MathComp.
• Ceramiststars116 - Verified hash-based approximate membership structures such as Bloom filters.
• MathComp Tutorial Materialsstars12 - Source code for Mathematical Components tutorials.
• Alectryonstars170 - Collection of tools for writing technical documents that mix Coq code and prose.
• Nix Coq packages - Collection of Coq-related packages for Nix.
• Simple IOstars24 - Input/output monad with user-definable primitive operations.
• coq_makefile - Build tool distributed with Coq and based on generating a makefile.
• hs-to-coqstars61 - Converter from Haskell code to equivalent Coq code.
• Roosterizestars15 - Tool for suggesting lemma names in Coq projects.
• FCFstars42 - Framework for proofs of cryptography.
• Ottstars254 - Tool for writing definitions of programming languages and calculi that can be translated to Coq.
• Coqtail Mathstars13 - Library of mathematical results ranging from arithmetic to real and complex analysis.
• PLClub Blog
• Thomas Letan's blog posts on Coq
• TLCstars26 - Non-constructive alternative to Coq's standard library.
• coq2htmlstars24 - Alternative HTML documentation generator for Coq.
• Completeness and Decidability of Modal Logic Calculistars5 - Soundness, completeness, and decidability for the logics K, K*, CTL, and PDL.
• CoqPrimestars23 - Library for certifying primality using Pocklington and Elliptic Curve certificates.
• Finmapstars45 - Extension of Mathematical Components with finite maps, sets, and multisets.
• Gaiastars21 - Implementation of books from Bourbaki's Elements of Mathematics, including set theory and number theory.
• Planet Coq link aggregator

• Program Logics for Certified Compilers - Book that explains how to construct program logics using separation logic, accompanied by a formal model in Coq which is applied to the Clight programming language and other examples.
• Foundations of Separation Logic - Introduction to using separation logic to reason about sequential imperative programs in Coq.
• Puiseuxthstars3 - Proof of Puiseux's theorem and computation of roots of polynomials of Puiseux's series.
• Official Coq standard library
• MIT PLV blog posts on Coq
• Coq record updatestars38 - Library which provides a generic way to update Coq record fields.
• Hierarchy Builderstars65 - Collection of commands for declaring Coq hierarchies based on packed classes.
• Graph Theorystars25 - Formalized graph theory results.
• Official Coq Zulip chat
• Incremental Cycles - Verified OCaml implementation of an algorithm for incremental cycle detection in graphs.
• Official Coq manual
• Docker-MathCompstars6 - Docker images for many combinations of versions of Coq and the Mathematical Components library.
• Infotheostars56 - Formalization of information theory and linear error-correcting codes.
• The Mathematical Components book - Book oriented towards mathematically inclined users, focusing on the Mathematical Components library and the SSReflect proof language.
• Coq'Art Exercises and Tutorialsstars71 - Coq code and exercises from the Coq'Art book, including additional tutorials.
• Formalised Undecidable Problemsstars84 - Library of undecidable problems and reductions between them.
• Regular Language Representationsstars29 - Translations between different definitions of regular languages, including regular expressions and automata.
• Ltac2 - Experimental typed tactic language similar to Coq's classic Ltac language.
• Nix - Package manager for Linux and other Unix systems, supporting atomic upgrades and rollbacks.
• CFML - Tool for proving properties of OCaml programs in separation logic.
• ALEAstars21 - Library for reasoning on randomized algorithms.
• Hahnstars27 - Library for reasoning on lists and binary relations.
• Cosettestars586 - Automated solver for reasoning about SQL query equivalences.
• Official Coq wiki
• Official Coq Twitter
• Coq tag on Stack Overflow
• Coq tag on Theoretical Computer Science Stack Exchange
• Coq Exchange: ideas and experiment reports about Coq
• Guillaume Claret's Coq blog
• Joachim Breitner's blog posts on Coq
• Poleiro: a Coq blog by Arthur Azevedo de Amorim
• Ralf Jung's blog posts on Coq
• Docker-Coqstars29 - Docker images for many versions of Coq.
• Coq'Art - The first book dedicated to Coq.
• Software Foundations - Series of Coq-based textbooks on logic, functional programming, and foundations of programming languages, aimed at being accessible to beginners.
• Certified Programming with Dependent Types - Textbook about practical engineering with Coq which teaches advanced practical tricks and a very specific style of proof.
• Formal Reasoning About Programs - Book that simultaneously provides a general introduction to formal logical reasoning about the correctness of programs and to using Coq for this purpose.

• Programs and Proofs - Book that gives a brief and practically-oriented introduction to interactive proofs in Coq which emphasizes the computational nature of inductive reasoning about decidable propositions via a small set of primitives from the SSReflect proof language.
• Computer Arithmetic and Formal Proofs - Book that describes how to formally specify and verify floating-point algorithms in Coq using the Flocq library.
• CoqEALstars60 - Framework to ease change of data representations in proofs.
• Metalibstars63 - Library for programming language metatheory using locally nameless variable binding representations.
• lngenstars27 - Tool for generating locally nameless Coq definitions and proofs.
• mCoqstars21 - Mutation analysis tool for Coq projects.
• Proof General - Generic interface for proof assistants based on the extensible, customizable text editor Emacs.
• Jupyter kernel for Coqstars73 - Coq support for the Jupyter Notebook web environment.
• Analysisstars135 - Library for classical real analysis compatible with Mathematical Components.
• Coquelicot - Formalization of classical real analysis compatible with the standard library and focusing on usability.
• Category Theory in Coqstars664 - Axiom-free formalization of category theory.
• Mathematical Components - Formalization of mathematical theories, focusing in particular on group theory.
• Coq in a Hurry - Introduction to how Coq can be used to define logical concepts and functions and reason about them.
• coq-haskellstars152 - Library smoothing the transition to Coq for Haskell users.
• Lemma Overloadingstars24 - Demonstration of design patterns for programming and proving with canonical structures.
• Mike Nahas's Coq Tutorial - Basics of using Coq to write formal proofs.
• Tricks in Coqstars388 - Tips, tricks, and features that are hard to discover.
• SMTCoqstars125 - Tool that checks proof witnesses coming from external SAT and SMT solvers.
• JSCertstars195 - Coq specification of ECMAScript 5 (JavaScript) with verified reference interpreter.
• Menhir - Parser generator that can output Coq code for verified parsers.
• Mathematical Components wiki
• AAC Tacticsstars28 - Tactics for rewriting universally quantified equations, modulo associativity and commutativity of some operator.
• Gappa - Tactic for discharging goals about floating-point arithmetic and round-off errors.
• Mtac2stars48 - Plugin adding typed tactics for backward reasoning.
• FCSL-PCMstars21 - Formalization of partial commutative monoids as used in verification of pointer-manipulating programs.
• Unicoqstars45 - Plugin that replaces the existing unification algorithm with an enhanced one.
• ExtLibstars114 - Collection of theories and plugins that may be useful in other Coq developments.
• Paco - Library for parameterized coinduction.
• Relation Algebrastars37 - Modular formalization of algebras with heterogeneous binary relations as models.

• CoqHammerstars182 - General-purpose automated reasoning hammer tool that combines learning from previous proofs with the translation of problems to automated provers and the reconstruction of found proofs.
• MetaCoqstars261 - Project formalizing Coq in Coq and providing tools for manipulating Coq terms and developing certified plugins.
• GeoCoqstars144 - Formalization of geometry based on Tarski's axiom system.
• Homotopy Type Theorystars1.1k - Development of homotopy-theoretic ideas.
• Math Classesstars147 - Abstract interfaces for mathematical structures based on type classes.
• Odd Order Theoremstars21 - Formal proof of the Odd Order Theorem, a landmark result of finite group theory.
• UniMathstars780 - Library which aims to formalize a substantial body of mathematics using the univalent point of view.
• Fiat-Cryptostars504 - Cryptographic primitive code generation.
• lambda-rust - Formal model of a Rust core language and type system, a logical relation for the type system, and safety proofs for some Rust libraries.
• Paramcoqstars44 - Plugin to generate parametricity translations of Coq terms.
• CoRNstars104 - Library of constructive real analysis and algebra.
• Fiatstars135 - Mostly automated synthesis of correct-by-construction programs.
• Iris - Higher-order concurrent separation logic framework.
• Verdistars536 - Framework for formally verifying distributed systems implementations.
• VST - Toolchain for verifying C code inside Coq in a higher-order concurrent, impredicative separation logic that is sound w.r.t. the Clight language of the CompCert compiler.
• CoqIDE - Standalone graphical tool for interacting with Coq.
• Coqtailstars184 - Interface for Coq based on the Vim text editor.
• Company-Coqstars322 - IDE extensions for Proof General's Coq mode.
• jsCoqstars0 - Port of Coq to JavaScript, which enables running Coq projects in a browser.
• Coq-std++ - Extended alternative standard library for Coq.
• Equationsstars188 - Function definition package for Coq.
• QuickChickstars223 - Plugin for randomized property-based testing.
• CoqOfOCamlstars177 - Tool for generating idiomatic Coq from OCaml code.
• CompCert - High-assurance compiler for almost all of the C language (ISO C99), generating efficient code for the PowerPC, ARM, RISC-V and x86 processors.
• Verdi Raftstars163 - Implementation of the Raft distributed consensus protocol, verified in Coq using the Verdi framework.
• Coq subreddit
• Official Coq website
• Official Coq Discourse forum
• Official Coq-Club mailing list
• Gagallium
• Gregory Malecha's blog
